subject: grammar
title: Exercise — Present Perfect Simple / Continuous
instruction:
Fill in the gaps with a verb from the box in the present perfect simple or present perfect continuous. You will need to use some verbs more than once.

Verb box: be | do | feel | have | live | pass | study | start | take | travel | want | work

Note: Questions 17–21 are open-ended personal questions (answers will vary).
passage:
Interviewer: How long have you been living (1 you) here?
Student: I 've been living (2) in London for the past three years. I come from Japan originally. I 've been studying (3) at a college here since I arrived.
Interviewer: Have you done (4 you) any travelling over the past three years?
Student: Yes, I 've been (5) really lucky. I have long holidays so I 've travelled (6) all over Europe. I especially liked Spain.
Interviewer: What is the most interesting thing you 've done (7) recently?
Student: Well, I 've started (8) to play tennis, and I 've been having (9) singing lessons for a few months now too. But the thing that I am most proud of is that I 've just passed (10 just) my driving test. It's the first time I 've taken (11) it so I'm really pleased but I 've never felt (12 never) so nervous in my life!
Interviewer: How do you think English will be useful in your life?
Student: I 've been doing (13) a Hospitality and Tourism course over here, so I need English for my studies and my job. I 've always wanted (14 always) to work in the tourist industry because I 've always been (15 always) interested in history and cultural sites, and I 've already worked (16 already) as a tour guide in my home town.

questions.text: I ___ in London for the past three years.
I ___ at a college here since I arrived.
___ (you) any travelling over the past three years?
What is the most interesting thing you ___ recently?
...and I ___ singing lessons for a few months now too.
It's the first time I ___ it
I ___ (never) so nervous in my life!
I ___ a Hospitality and Tourism course over here,
I ___ (always) to work in the tourist industry
...because I ___ (always) interested in history and cultural sites,
...and I ___ (already) as a tour guide in my home town.
